text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/81> (draft): 

> The X Window System: corrections and modernisation

Essentially: 

* KDE Plasma does not require procfs.

Whilst there, I performed a few other edits, including (overlap with this bug 263782) some sysrc stuff. 

Take as much, or as little, as you want from the pull request.
